THE SIMPLE WAY
TO BE RIGHT

Bring your digital layouts to life with millimetric accuracy using projected reality

Contact Sales

DISCOVER THE PRODUCT

Trusted Worldwide


Introducing
the XR Projector

The flagship XR Projector ensures consistent accuracy and enhances the efficiency of your layout operations with a highly productive visual workflow. Whether you're working on floors, ceilings, or walls, its advanced positioning technology provides best-in-class visual projection, adaptable to any job site.


Paired with a remote tablet and web application, the XR Projector seamlessly integrates with your existing workflow, from BIM applications to standard projects.

Compact and easy to carry

Carry your instrument in one go — no need for additional total stations or extra equipment. The XR Projector is a fully standalone product, compact enough to fit in a backpack.

3D scanning capacities

Map surface elevations with precision to ensure absolute accuracy across your project. Export 3D point data seamlessly and perform thorough quality control.

2D & 3D projections

Project onto floors, walls, and ceilings, even at multiple elevations. Easily import 2D or 3D CAD files to streamline your operations and ensure precision at every stage


Millimetric accuracy

Achieve millimetric accuracy on every project, ensuring that even the most intricate details are executed to perfection, giving you confidence and control over every aspect of your work

Learn More


Introducing the XR Projector


The flagship XR Projector ensures consistent accuracy and enhances the efficiency of your layout operations with a highly productive visual workflow. Whether you're working on floors, ceilings, or walls, its advanced positioning technology provides best-in-class visual projection, adaptable to any job site.


Paired with a remote tablet and web application, the XR Projector seamlessly integrates with your existing workflow, from BIM applications to standard projects.





SIMPLICITY

Make your daily tasks easier

The XR Projector drastically simplifies on-site layout tasks, making it easier to manage your human resources. With this tool, more members of your workforce can now perform layout tasks efficiently. It requires just a 3-hour training to become fully operational, and we offer an online program to enable your trained staff to easily train others.

Discover more with use cases


VERSATILITY

Works for every job

With the ability to project onto multiple surfaces and the ease of transporting the equipment from one job site to another, the XR Projector becomes a versatile tool for any type of job. Whether it's large-scale commercial projects or smaller daily tasks, regardless of the trade, it's designed to meet your needs effortlessly.


Discover more about the industries


EXCELLENCE

Build with confidence

Using the most precise tools on your projects enables your workforce to build with complete confidence. Every material is laid out with pinpoint accuracy, allowing your team to easily detect clashes with other trade partners on site.

Discover more about the technology


 See the XR Projector at Work

 Experience full-scale layouts projected directly onto your job site, bringing your designs to life

Our Happy Customers

See what our customers are saying about us.


As a surveying firm, accuracy is everything. The XR Projector has given us the confidence to deliver precise layouts faster than ever. It has streamlined our workflow and expanded our market opportunities ─ a true game changer.
Christophe Podevin
Chief Project Manager, Haller Wasser

The XR Projector has drastically improved our layout speed. We have seen that on some projects, tasks that used to take hours can now be completed in minute, with the same accuracy. This is a must for any construction team.
Frédéric Gauthier
CEO, MG Construction

The XR Projector not only cuts layout time by half but also enhances quality control, allowing for earlier and more effective self-monitoring. Its simplicity enables us to reallocate building trades internally, reducing our subcontractor dependency.
Samy Merry
Innovation Manager at Solutions Habitat, 
division of VINCI Construction

Fujita is proud to participate in the development of the XR Projector. This innovation considerably simplifies and accelerates the delivery of our project
Fujita DaiwaHouse Group

about the technology?

and efficiency of your next construction project.
